hero.lead: Dream Legacy RP is the PlayStation 3 roleplay project powered by RLO. Join the Discord servers, complete verification, submit your whitelist application, and get ready to connect.

join.title: How to Join
join.desc: The steps below keep the community organized and make sure each player is ready before joining.
join.req5: A new PSN account for roleplay.
join.enlist1: Join the Dream Legacy RP, and RLO Discord servers.
join.enlist4: Once approved, you are ready to connect.

map.title: Neighborhood Map
map.desc: Use the city map as a visual reference for districts, routes, scenes, and roleplay planning.

whitelist.title: Join RRP
whitelist.lead: Submit your application below to join the Reloading RP community. Fields marked optional can be left blank.
whitelist.storyPh: Tell us about your character's backstory, motivations, and personality...
whitelist.extraInfoPh: Any additional details - appearance, skills, affiliations, etc.

jobs.title: Jobs
jobs.lead: Browse available roles and apply to start your career in Los Santos.
jobs.noOne: No one has this job yet.
jobs.starterLead: Low-commitment roles to get you started.

settings.title: Settings
settings.lead: Choose your theme, music, and more.
settings.themeDesc: Pick a color palette inspired by the three protagonists.
settings.musicDesc: Paste a YouTube link to play music in the background.

login.title: Whitelist Login
login.subtitle: Enter your RP Name and password

notify.themeNotLoggedIn: Log in to save your theme preference.
notify.whitelistSuccess: Successfully whitelisted! You can now log in with your RP Name and password.
